title: UACC-Intercom-Sunshield, sunshield accessory for UA-Intercom
description: UACC-Intercom-Sunshield is a sunshield for UA-Intercom. It can be used both in combination with surface mounting, which is included in the box with the intercom, and with optional accessories in the form of surface mounting at an angle of 5° upwards. The sunshield is made of powder-coated galvanized steel
